Hero.lead_text: "Extra Auto Transport" possesses appropriate machinery and vehicles with which it successfully performs tasks in civil engineering and logistics — with a professional workforce ready for the most demanding projects.
Hero.service_1_desc: We possess top-tier machinery and expert staff with whom we successfully perform all types of tasks in the field of civil engineering and road economy.
Hero.service_2_desc: With 50 vehicles in our fleet and our own storage capacity of 20,000 t, we provide all types of services: domestic and international transport.
Hero.service_3_desc: With the latest generation Wirtgen WR series machine, we successfully carry out operations in soil stabilization and cold recycling of roads.
Hero.service_4_desc: Production and installation of crushed stone aggregate and high-quality asphalt for every request in road infrastructure.

About.lead_text_1: "Extra Auto Transport" is a domestic company founded in 2007. We possess modern machinery, our own service center, and a highly professional and quality workforce.
About.lead_text_2: Companies within our group employ over 250 people.
About.lead_text_3: Through quality work, respect for agreed deadlines, and business professionalism, "Extra Auto Transport" has quickly ranked among the leading companies in Vojvodina and Serbia for civil engineering, road economy, water management, and bridge construction.
About.extra_agrar_desc: The subsidiary Extra Agrar was founded in early 2011 and quickly became a reliable partner to its customers and suppliers.
About.zgop_desc: ZGOP operates within the Extra Auto Transport system and is in charge of the construction and overhaul of railways.

HomeContact.headline: Get in touch
HomeContact.lead_text: Interested in cooperation or have questions about our services? Leave us a message and our team will reply as soon as possible.

Footer.company_desc: Leader in Vojvodina and the region for civil engineering, road economy, domestic and international transport.
Footer.copyright: © {year} Extra Auto Transport. All rights reserved.

metadata.title: Services | Extra Auto Transport
metadata.description: "Extra Auto Transport" possesses appropriate machinery and vehicles with which it successfully performs numerous services in the field of civil engineering and logistics.
metadata.keywords: services, civil engineering, transport, asphalt, recycling

ServicesPage.title: Our Services
ServicesPage.description: "Extra Auto Transport" possesses appropriate machinery and vehicles with which it successfully performs the following services:
ServicesPage.item_3: Production and installation of crushed stone aggregate
ServicesPage.item_7: Clearing, cleaning and leveling of all types of terrain
ServicesPage.item_8: All types of excavation (earth, clay, ore...)
ServicesPage.item_9: Transport of all types of bulk and bagged goods
ServicesPage.item_10: Loading and unloading of bulk and palletized goods
ServicesPage.item_11: Storage of bulk and bagged goods

metadata.title: Equipment | Extra Auto Transport
metadata.description: The technical equipment of "Extra Auto Transport" is at an enviable level. The company owns equipment from renowned global manufacturers.

EquipmentPage.title: Our Equipment
EquipmentPage.description_1: The technical equipment of "Extra Auto Transport" is at an enviable level. The company owns equipment and transport vehicles from renowned global manufacturers: Wirtgen, Hamm, New Holland, JCB, Mercedes, Scania, Komatsu, Ropa, etc.
EquipmentPage.description_2: All equipment and transport vehicles are operated and regularly serviced by highly qualified licensed mechanics, so their technical correctness is constantly taken care of.

item_11.title: Ropa Tiger
item_11.desc: Beet harvesting combine. Bunker 30t, Harvester at 45-50cm, Capacity up to 30 ha/day, Possibility of working in extremely difficult conditions caused by heavy rainfall. Option: variable header, integral and with leaf spreader

item_13.title: Ropa Euro Maus
item_13.desc: The most modern combined sugar beet cleaner and loader, with the ability to work in all conditions. Cleaning and loading speed 30t/5min

item_16.title: Telehandler
item_16.desc: It has the ability to combine attaching working devices, pallet truck, loading bucket, bale loading scissors, etc.

metadata.title: Extra Agrar | Extra Auto Transport
metadata.description: The company trades in cereals, oilseeds, animal feed components and reproductive materials for agricultural production.
metadata.keywords: Extra Agrar, cereals, agriculture, Kula, purchase, animal feed

ExtraAgrarPage.title: Extra Agrar
ExtraAgrarPage.description_1: The subsidiary Extra Agrar was founded at the beginning of 2011 and in a short time became a reliable partner to its customers and suppliers.
ExtraAgrarPage.description_2: The company trades in cereals, oilseeds, animal feed components and reproductive materials for agricultural production.
ExtraAgrarPage.description_3: Extra Agrar has floor warehouses in Kula with a capacity of 15,000 t and at that location purchases agricultural crops and contracts agricultural production.
